source_evidence_bundle_ref.reason: The handoff can draft public copy only from bounded release-notes evidence.

draft_outputs.reason: Draft release notes must omit public download claims until publication evidence exists.
Installation copy remains planned until artifact refs exist.

checkpoints.reason: Human draft review has not passed.
No publication refs have been recorded.

approval_flow.reason: Human approval remains required before any public release claim.

destination_surfaces.no_overclaim_note: README release claims must wait for public artifact and publication evidence.
destination_surfaces.reason: This fixture does not edit live README content.

destination_surfaces.no_overclaim_note: Docs-site installation copy must not say package channels are live without channel evidence.
Package metadata requires channel-specific publication refs before availability claims.
destination_surfaces.reason: Package-manager channels are planned only in this draft.

destination_surfaces.no_overclaim_note: Marketplace/listing text must preserve limitations and publication status.
destination_surfaces.reason: No marketplace publication is part of this draft.

destination_surfaces.no_overclaim_note: Official release page copy must omit downloadable artifact claims until artifact evidence exists.
Announcement copy must cite approved release notes and known limitations.
destination_surfaces.reason: Announcement copy is planned only after release notes approval.

publication_refs.reason: Draft ref only; no public publication is claimed.

no_overclaim_rules: Do not claim downloadable artifacts until public artifact refs and integrity metadata exist.
Do not claim package-manager availability until the specific channel metadata is published and verified.
Do not turn missing evidence into weaker marketing language.
Do not remove known limitations from public copy unless newer evidence resolves them.
Do not treat draft public-output refs as live publication evidence.

rollback_triggers: Published copy claims artifacts that are not present.
Published copy omits a known limitation that remains true.
Published copy references a package channel without channel evidence.
rollback_follow_up.follow_up_policy: Record rollback or correction refs in the release workspace and create follow-up work for unresolved publication gaps.

follow_up_refs.reason: Publishing handoff owns follow-up policy for public docs gaps.

known_limitations.summary: No live public artifact publication is claimed by this draft handoff.
known_limitations.public_copy_instruction: Omit public availability or state that publication evidence is pending.

publication_boundary.reason: This handoff fixture defines draft movement only and does not publish live public docs.

summary.decision: Draft outputs are allowed; public publication remains blocked pending approval and publication evidence.
summary.reason: The required human publication review and artifact publication refs are missing.
